novel_features.name: Price-cut detection
novel_features.description: Surfaces every synced listing whose asking price dropped between syncs, with old price, new price, percent cut, and days on market at the cut.

novel_features.name: Days-on-market
novel_features.description: Computes true days on market for every live listing from the date the CLI first saw it, and flags aged inventory past a threshold.

novel_features.name: Market velocity
novel_features.description: Reports absorption for a submarket: new listings, delistings, median days on market, and net supply change per period.

novel_features.name: Delisting detection
novel_features.description: Lists listings present in a prior sync but absent now — sold, withdrawn, or expired.

novel_features.name: Cap-rate and yield distribution
novel_features.description: Reports the cap-rate, NOI, and price-per-square-foot distribution (count, min, median, quartiles, max) for synced for-sale listings in a submarket, and flags listings whose cap rate falls outside the interquartile range.

novel_features.name: Distress and motivation scan
novel_features.description: Flags listings carrying motivation signals: price-reduced and must-sell keyword hits in the description, Ten-X auction listings, and recent price cuts.

novel_features.name: Submarket digest
novel_features.description: Rolls a synced submarket into one report: live supply count, recent price cuts, median days on market, new and delisted counts, and distress hits.

novel_features.name: Pipeline feed export
novel_features.description: Exports the latest synced submarket as a run-stamped JSON or CSV file, with records mapped to the six CRE market-intelligence data categories.
